title: QP Oversight of a CMO: Routine Controls
alt: Five sequential disciplines a QP applies to control contract manufacturing

items.label: Qualify before reliance
items.desc: On-site GMP audit confirms quality system before commercial supply

items.label: Periodic audit programme
items.desc: Risk-based re-audit under ICH Q9, every two to three years

items.label: Live deviation visibility
items.desc: Monthly review of a shared deviation and CAPA log

items.label: Product Quality Reviews
items.desc: Annual PQR consolidates and challenges data across the chain

items.label: Batch certification dossier
items.desc: Confirm process, deviations and supply chain under Annex 16
